findings.title: Potential Privacy Risk Identified
findings.description: Detected privacy risk keywords indicating potential issues with PII handling or consent mechanisms in the documentation.
assumptions: The identified keywords suggest a need for further investigation into privacy practices.

evidence.excerpt: Detected privacy risk keywords in 1 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a thorough review of privacy practices and ensure compliance with data handling policies.

findings.title: Critical Android 14 Notification Delivery Failure
findings.description: Push notifications are failing on Android 14 devices, affecting approximately 8% of users, which poses a critical risk to user engagement.
assumptions: The failure affects a significant portion of the user base.

evidence.excerpt: Resolve the issue where push notifications fail to deliver on Android 14 devices.

recommendations: Fix the notification delivery issue on Android 14 devices immediately.

findings.title: High Risk of Notification Delivery Latency
findings.description: Reducing notification delivery latency requires significant architectural changes, which poses a risk of introducing new issues during implementation.
assumptions: Architectural changes may lead to unforeseen complications.

evidence.excerpt: Reducing notification delivery latency requires significant architectural changes.

recommendations: Carefully plan and test the architectural changes to mitigate risks.

findings.title: Accessibility Issues with Notification Center
findings.description: Accessibility concerns have been raised regarding the notification center, particularly for users with screen readers and colorblindness, indicating a need for improved design.
assumptions: Current design may not meet WCAG standards.

evidence.excerpt: Accessibility concerns have been raised regarding the notification center.

recommendations: Enhance the design of the notification center to address accessibility issues.

metadata.policy_rule: Accessibility is a requirement, not an afterthought

findings.title: Compliance Risk with Data Handling Practices
findings.description: Detected compliance risk keywords indicating potential gaps in GDPR and CCPA compliance related to data handling practices.
assumptions: Compliance practices may not fully align with regulations.

evidence.excerpt: Detected compliance risk keywords in 2 source(s)

recommendations: Conduct a compliance audit to ensure alignment with GDPR and CCPA.

summary: Identified 5 risks (1 accessibility, 1 compliance, 1 privacy, 2 security). 1 flagged as blockers. Risk gate: FAILED (1 blockers, 1 warnings).
